name: Jenny Winter
message:
Hello George & Dragon team
Sadly Dave Greenwood and I have had to cancel our reservation for 5 people for Christmas Day lunch.  We were bringing Dave's parents and my mother.  Dave's mother has Alzheimer's that is steadily getting worse.  Last week she had a fall, after which we've decided it may not be safe to bring her to the pub.  We'll join you for a Christmas Day drink.
Best wishes
Jenny Winter

name: Zoe Pham
message:
Hi dragonpub.co.uk, 
 
You’re providing high-quality content for your readers. 
 
By the way, I know an amazing tool that can make your website more engaging. It’s an AI-powered platform that creates whiteboard videos from any idea in just a few clicks. No technical or design skills are needed. 
 
Whether you’re a small business owner, this tool helps you turn ideas into memorable visuals. Imagine your content being more memorable and shareable. 
 
Plus, these videos are great for promoting your services online, and they’re also perfect for in-person events. 
 
Check it out here: https://tinyurl.com/instadvideo 
 
I thought this might be something your visitors would enjoy. It’s perfect for anyone looking to stand out online. 
 
Thank you for your time, and hope your readers enjoy this tool as much as I do.

name: Aleks Saunders
message:
I hope you’re well. I’m getting in touch to enquire about hiring your venue for a joint anniversary and birthday celebration with friends and family. We are looking to hold the event on a weekend in late September or October.

We’re expecting around 60 guests and are hoping to host the event in the afternoon, running into the late evening. We would like food and alcohol to be available throughout the event, ideally with a range of budgets and options to consider.

I look forward to hearing from you soon to discuss.

Best wishes,

Aleks

name: Tim Anderson
message:
Hello to you, I have a reservation on Sunday for 12 people. I was asked to send in the main dish orders just in case. There might be some people that want starters etc but I was told we can do that on the day. 
Mushroom wellington x2
Stack attack x1
Roast pork x1
Roast beef x4
Brie and cranberry wellington x1
Fish and chips x2
Mixed meat roast. X1
Could you message me back with confirmation of receipt and booking time.
Many thanks. 
Tim

name: Gemma Marshall
message:
Hi,

We run a hands-on agency that helps clients' Instagram accounts build authority and reach new audiences. Rather than just "adding numbers," we focus on tangible benefits:

1. Cheaper than Ads: We deliver targeted eyes on your profile for a fraction of the cost of running Instagram Ads.
2. Real Community: We target users genuinely interested in your niche, leading to higher engagement and potential sales.
3. 100% Account Safety: We don't use bots. Our team performs every action manually on actual smartphones, keeping your account secure.
4. Consistent Results: Expect 300+ new, high-quality followers every month who actually stick around.

We are currently offering spots starting at just $60/month with no long-term contracts.

I'd be happy to forward you some further information if that would be of interest?

Note: We also work with Youtube Channels.

Kind Regards,
Gemma

https://unsubscribe.social/unsubscribe.php?d=dragonpub.co.uk

name: Lauren Aldridge
message:
Good evening, 

I'm looking to enquire about hiring out for my 30th birthday party. It would be on Saturday the 4th July this year if possible? 
Looking at around 40 guests roughly. 
Am I able to bring my own food in or can I ask about how much extra it would be to have food? 
Maybe even a buffet style? 
Are there any limits for decorations? 
I'm thinking of a cake/cupcakes, balloons and maybe some decorations 

I also wondered if you had any recommendations for a DJ please? 

I would love any more information you have. 

Many thanks 
Lauren Aldridge

name: Drew McLintock
message:
Hi, 
I've just booked for lunch for 8 people on Wed 8 July 2026. 
We are 8 retired men, travelling in 4 classic cars, on our way to the Channel Tunnel. 
1) Do you have enough off road parking ? 
2) Do you have GF options on your menu ? 
Many thanks,
Drew
